name: reference-addition
expression: (function () { try { x + 1; return 'no-throw'; } catch (e) { return e.constructor.name; } })()

name: reference-strict-equals
expression: (function () { try { x === 1; return 'no-throw'; } catch (e) { return e.constructor.name; } })()

name: implicit-global-assignment
expression: (function () { function run() { implicitCrossCheck = 1; return globalThis.implicitCrossCheck === 1; } var result = run(); delete globalThis.implicitCrossCheck; return String(result); })()

name: global-var-binding
expression: (function () { var value = (0, eval)('var crossCheckVar = 7; globalThis.crossCheckVar === 7;'); delete globalThis.crossCheckVar; return String(value); })()
